name: Brocoli and Cheese Omlets
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk eggs, water, salt, and pepper until well combined.
Have your fillings chopped and at room temperature and your serving plates ready.
2. For each omelet: Heat a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until it's very hot and a drop of water flicked onto the surface bounces. Add 1 tablespoon margarine or olive oil and tilt pan to coat. Add 1/2 cup egg mixture. Using a circular motion, work your way from the edge towards the center. Repeat until the egg is set but still moist on top (the omelet will continue to cook as it fills and folds).
3. Holding skillet handle in your left hand, pointed at your navel, place 1/4 of the cheese and broccoli onto the left half of the omelet (for left-handed cooks, reverse sides). Fold the unfilled side over the filling.
4. Holding the skillet handle in your right hand, carefully slide a plate under the skillet. Invert the skillet so the omelet falls onto the plate, resulting in a smooth surface on top.
Note: This recipe was inspired by Womans Day and is intended for daily recipes.
